name: wordpress-embed-continuity
description: Embeddable MascotBot voice widget with conversation continuity across full page reloads, plus a WordPress-simulating demo site.

scripts.install:all: pnpm -C widget install && pnpm -C demo-site install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n widget,demo -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -C widget dev" "pnpm -C demo-site dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C widget build && pnpm -C demo-site build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C widget typecheck && pnpm -C demo-site typecheck
